title: How to use the variable person assigned instead of fix value to someone?
excerpt: I want to use the person assigned to some variable so that I can assign any work to anyone and that creates an item in that variable board and that can be mirrored with my main board. Can somebody help me in this?

posts.author: Akhil (Akhil Goplani)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to use the person assigned to some variable so that I can assign any work to anyone and that creates an item in that variable board and that can be mirrored with my main board. Can somebody help me in this?
